title: Fix Internet Identity auth flow, account initialization, and profile save permissions

requirements.text: Fix the backend Internet Identity authentication flow so that a user's account is correctly initialized on first login. The `registerOrLogin` function must reliably create a new user record when none exists for the caller's principal, and return the existing record on subsequent logins without throwing or returning an error variant.
acceptanceCriteria: Calling `registerOrLogin` for a new principal creates a user record and returns it successfully
Calling `registerOrLogin` for an existing principal returns the existing record without error
No 'Failed to initialize your account' error appears in the frontend after login

requirements.text: Fix backend database permissions so that an authenticated user can create and update their own profile. The `saveProfile` (or equivalent update) function must correctly validate that the caller's principal matches the profile being written, and persist the changes to stable storage.

quotes: Fix database permissions so profile saving works

acceptanceCriteria: An authenticated user can save their profile without receiving a permission or authorization error
Profile data persists across calls and is retrievable via `getProfile`
No 'Failed to save profile' error appears in the frontend after submitting the profile form

requirements.text: Ensure the complete user flow works end-to-end: Internet Identity login → account initialization → profile save → dashboard. The frontend AuthPage must correctly handle the response from `registerOrLogin` and route the user to profile setup if incomplete, or to the dashboard if complete. The ProfilePage must successfully submit updates and redirect to the dashboard.

quotes: Test full flow: Signup → Login → Profile Save → Dashboard

acceptanceCriteria: Logging in via Internet Identity initializes the account and redirects to the correct page (profile setup or dashboard)
Submitting the profile form saves the data and navigates to the dashboard
Dashboard correctly loads and displays the authenticated user's profile stats and match count

constraints: Do not change the UI design or any frontend visual elements
Internet Identity must remain the sole authentication mechanism
All Motoko logic must remain in backend/main.mo (single-actor architecture)
nonGoals: Any UI redesign or layout changes
New features beyond fixing the broken auth and profile save flow
